checks.name: structured-finalization-model
checks.detail: Automation items now support optional remediation points through the `solutions` field.

checks.name: install-cli-rendering
checks.detail: Plain-text install output renders the problem as the main line and remediation steps as separate bullets.

checks.name: install-tui-rendering
checks.detail: The final TUI install screen renders the same remediation points distinctly.

checks.name: structured-json-contract
checks.detail: Install finalization / onboarding JSON keeps remediation structured instead of flattening it into warning text.

checks.name: verification-commands
checks.detail: bootstrap typecheck/tests and repo-level lint/typecheck/test all passed after the scoped fix.

checks.name: tui-warning-solutions-regression
checks.detail: The final-screen regression test now directly covers warning-item remediation bullets in addition to runtime and CLI rendering.

checks.name: proof-bundle-finalized
checks.detail: spec.md, evidence.md, evidence.json, problems.md, task.json, and verdict.json now reflect the completed proof loop and can be validated by the repo-native task validator.
